name: Shrunken At Home RPG
description:
Based on the interactive game Shrunken At Home, found at giantess-interactive.com

You are living in an apartment building, during a Shrinking Virus pandemic. Any men who get exposed to this virus, shrink down to the size of a bug! You've caught the virus, and suddenly shrink! Uh-oh!

What do you do now? Can you trust Dakota? Should you try and get her attention? Or would you be better leaving your apartment and trying your luck with somebody else living on your floor.
creator: Benny12
